prompt: Studio product photograph of a glossy black ceramic 15-ounce coffee mug with a thicker D-shaped handle on the LEFT side, set on a smooth dark slate-grey surface against a slightly lighter grey backdrop. The mug body is COMPLETELY BLANK, UNBRANDED, with NO logos, NO print, NO decals, NO graphics, NO text anywhere on the ceramic surface — a plain unmarked mockup ready for custom branding application. Eye-level straight-on composition, soft directional light from upper-right creates a vertical highlight running down the right edge of the cylindrical body. High contrast, very desaturated near-greyscale palette. Working-contractor catalog feel, gritty documentary tone, NOT cafe lifestyle, NOT food-magazine glossy. No coffee, no spoon, no people.
